headline: How Investors May Respond To Stryker (SYK) Cyber Disruption As Q1 2026 Earnings Expectations Build
summary: Stryker recently faced a cybersecurity disruption and is set to report its first-quarter 2026 results, with analysts watching MedSurg and Neurotechnology performance alongside expected 8% year-on-year revenue growth. Despite the disruption, analysts are emphasizing continued demand for procedures, robotics, and product innovation as they reassess how near-term costs and operational challenges could shape Stryker's earnings path. Next, we’ll examine how expectations for segment growth and...
